raw_consumer_statement: I discovered two fraudulent charges on my Citi credit card statement from XXXX for {$94.00} on XX/XX/year> and {$170.00} on XX/XX/year>. I also received an empty padded envelope with tracking info on it in the mail around the same time, which I threw away since I didnt realize at the time it was a scam. When I discovered the fraudulent charges a couple weeks later, I reported the card as stolen, called XXXX for details on the transactions, and initiated a dispute. I received a follow up letter a while later asking me to complete a form stating the charges were not mine ( which I did ). I also included a copy of the identity theft report from the case I filed with the FTC regarding this incident, and sent all of it to Citi by the deadline of XX/XX/year>. A couple weeks later I received a response from Citi that my claim was denied and I am being charged for both fraudulent transactions. I tried calling Citi again on XX/XX/year>, spoke with two different reps who were unable to help me, was given a different number to call where I was unable to actually get through their automated system, and none of this was ever resolved.
